violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Tin foil lining the shelving next to the flattop.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Inside of the ice machine needs to be cleaned.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. Grease laden cardboard underneath the fryer is not a nonabsorbent surface.
Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. Observed open bags/boxes in chest freezer

Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Raw animal food * was not properly separated from raw or cooked ready-to-eat food . Ground/raw beef open pkgd next to produce and milk on same shelf

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. product containers opened or reused but not labeled with a date.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Large amount of tape was in upper left corner of a dry storage Pepsi machine.
Temperature measuring devices. — --Temperature measuring device was not provided. No thermometers present in all three freezers.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. Microwave across from hand sink had melted food present. Ice scoop being stored in direct contact of a dusty vent blowing onto it.--Nonfood contact surface * was not cleaned adequately. Door gasket on 2door freezer has mold present.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Ventilation hood has two dimensional grease present on frame and grates.
Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was reused or used more than one time. styrofoam cup was used in breading tote as a scoop.

Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. Three compartment sink drain is too deep into the waste pipe, no open air gap present.
Toilet facilities. — --Toilet room used by women did not contain at least one covered waste receptacle. Bathroom located in kitchen area did not have covered trash.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Attachments to walls and ceilings (e.g. light fixtures, vent covers, decorations etc..) were not cleanable and/or maintained in good repair. Air ducts in kitchen area have three dimensional dust present.
